response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Checked phonetics against available Hololive lyrics databases for both '青春アーカイブ' (Seishun Archive) and '夢見る空へ' (Yume Miru Sora e). The vocal audio matches the official lyrics of both songs perfectly.
2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON lacked full lyrics, so we manually transcribed 100% of the lyrics for both songs and translated them with context awareness.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly aligned with vocal entry points, utilizing instantaneous transitions and aggressive end-time truncation to prevent cascading delays during fast-paced segments.

subtitles.original: 逃げるな 水滴 がんばれ落ちて
subtitles.english: Don't run away, water droplets, hang in there and fall!

subtitles.original: 青春 感じているまま 勝負
subtitles.english: Feeling our youth, it's a showdown!

subtitles.original: あっちゅう間に 成長した姿を見せたい
subtitles.english: In the blink of an eye, I want to show you how much I've grown

subtitles.original: リハーサルは完璧 本番はもっと 全力で
subtitles.english: Rehearsal was perfect; the real performance will be even more, with all our might!

subtitles.original: 大切な思い出に
subtitles.english: They will probably become...

subtitles.original: なってしまうのだろうけどね まだ
subtitles.english: ...precious memories, but not yet!

subtitles.original: 感傷に浸ってる暇はない
subtitles.english: There's no time to be sentimental

subtitles.original: 今世紀最大級の夏が始まる
subtitles.english: The greatest summer of this century is starting!

subtitles.original: Woah~ 想像の果てにある高み
subtitles.english: Woah~ The heights at the end of imagination

subtitles.original: Woah~ 勝ち獲った景色は尊い
subtitles.english: Woah~ The scenery we won is precious

subtitles.original: Woah~ 逃げるな 限界の壁越えて
subtitles.english: Woah~ Don't run away, cross the wall of limits!

subtitles.original: Woah~ 僕らはまだチャレンジャー
subtitles.english: Woah~ We are still challengers!

subtitles.original: 潤んだ 幾重に溺れたって
subtitles.english: Even if we drown in the damp layers

subtitles.original: 確かなノイズを手繰り寄せるように
subtitles.english: As if pulling in the certain noise

subtitles.original: 期待外れだと誰かが嘆く
subtitles.english: Someone laments that it's disappointing

subtitles.original: 痛いと痛いがいつも戦う
subtitles.english: Pain and pain are always fighting

subtitles.original: プライドだけを頼りに抗う
subtitles.english: Resisting, relying only on pride

subtitles.original: 自分を信じたい
subtitles.english: I want to believe in myself

subtitles.original: 努力は報われる
subtitles.english: Effort is rewarded

subtitles.original: 笑いたい奴は笑ってろ
subtitles.english: Let those who want to laugh, laugh!

subtitles.original: 感傷に浸ってる暇はない
subtitles.english: There's no time to be sentimental

subtitles.original: 今世紀最大級の夏が始まる
subtitles.english: The greatest summer of this century is starting!

subtitles.original: Woah~ 反響が足りない もっともっと
subtitles.english: Woah~ The echo isn't enough, more, more!

subtitles.original: Woah~ 後悔はさせない
subtitles.english: Woah~ I won't let you regret it

subtitles.original: Woah~ 想像の果てにある高み
subtitles.english: Woah~ The heights at the end of imagination

subtitles.original: Woah~ 勝ち獲った景色は尊い
subtitles.english: Woah~ The scenery we won is precious

subtitles.original: Woah~ 逃げるな 限界の壁越えて
subtitles.english: Woah~ Don't run away, cross the wall of limits!

subtitles.original: Woah~ 僕らはまだチャレンジャー
subtitles.english: Woah~ We are still challengers!

subtitles.original: 重ねた手はぎゅっと離さずに
subtitles.english: Hold our joined hands tight and don't let go

subtitles.original: 行くよ 行こう 夢見る空へ
subtitles.english: Let's go, let's go to the sky we dream of!

subtitles.original: 窓越しに見上げた
subtitles.english: Looking up through the window

subtitles.original: とても小さな空
subtitles.english: At the very small sky

subtitles.original: ここで出会えたのは
subtitles.english: That we were able to meet here

subtitles.original: 数え切れない奇跡
subtitles.english: Is a countless miracle

subtitles.original: 繰り返した一歩が
subtitles.english: Each step we repeated

subtitles.original: きらめきを繋いで
subtitles.english: Connected the sparkles

subtitles.original: 星のような笑顔
subtitles.english: A star-like smile

subtitles.original: 導いた
subtitles.english: Guided us

subtitles.original: Day by day
subtitles.english: Day by day

subtitles.original: みんなの声が力になる
subtitles.english: Everyone's voices become our strength

subtitles.original: Stage by stage
subtitles.english: Stage by stage

subtitles.original: ここでそれぞれ目指すもの
subtitles.english: Here, what each of us aims for...

subtitles.original: それぞれ描くもの
subtitles.english: ...what each of us paints...

subtitles.original: それぞれ願った夢へ
subtitles.english: ...to the dream each of us wished for

subtitles.original: 重ねた手はぎゅっと離さずに
subtitles.english: Hold our joined hands tight and don't let go

subtitles.original: ひとりひとり違う色で
subtitles.english: Each and every one of us, in different colors,

subtitles.original: 描き出すときめき
subtitles.english: Drawing out the excitement

subtitles.original: 振り向くことなく真っ直ぐに
subtitles.english: Straight ahead without looking back

subtitles.original: 行くよ 行こう 夢見る空へ
subtitles.english: Let's go, let's go to the sky we dream of!

subtitles.original: 笑い合ったことや
subtitles.english: The times we laughed together,

subtitles.original: 尽きない悩み
subtitles.english: And our endless worries,

subtitles.original: 思い出いっぱいなのに
subtitles.english: Even though they're full of memories...
